news.headline: Fifth Third Foundation pledges $250,000 to aid Hurricane Milton recovery efforts in Florida, supporting local nonprofits.
news.summary: Following the devastation caused by Hurricane Milton in Florida, the Fifth Third Foundation has pledged $250,000 to assist local nonprofit organizations in their efforts to aid affected communities. Kala Gibson, the chief corporate responsibility officer for Fifth Third, emphasized the importance of stepping up as a corporate citizen and neighbor during times of crisis. This commitment reflects the company's dedication to providing care and support to those in need as they begin the process of rebuilding.

news.headline: Law firm investigates $1.7B Zuora buyout by private equity firm Silver Lake and Singaporean firm.
news.summary: Investigations are being conducted by Julie & Holleman LLP, a prominent shareholder rights firm, regarding the acquisition of Zuora, Inc. (NYSE: ZUO) by private equity firm Silver Lake and Singaporean investment firm GIC Pte. Ltd. The proposed buyout is valued at $1.7 billion. The deal is under scrutiny for further assessment.

news.headline: 59 counterparties take $262.210b at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Foundation Source acquires Vennfi, fintech behind Donor-Advised Fund CharityVest. Oct 17, 2024. Leading in philanthropic solutions.
news.summary: Foundation Source has expanded its portfolio by acquiring new enterprise-grade, tech-enabled offerings, including donor-advised fund and workplace giving capabilities. This move solidifies Foundation Source's position as the top provider of comprehensive philanthropic solutions. The acquisition took place in Fairfield, Conn. on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Avangrid recognized as one of 100 Best Corporate Citizens of 2024 by 3BL for sustainability efforts among US companies.
news.summary: Avangrid, Inc. (NYSE: AGR), a prominent sustainable energy firm and part of the Iberdrola Group, was named one of the 100 Best Corporate Citizens of 2024 by 3BL, a notable sustainability communication ally. This recognition highlights Avangrid’s outstanding dedication to environmental, social, and governance aspects among the major US public companies. The assessment assesses the transparency and performance in these areas, showcasing Avangrid's strong commitment to sustainable practices.

news.headline: Gateway Fiber is launching 100% fiber internet service in Pittsfield, MA, promising faster and more reliable connectivity.
news.summary: In Pittsfield, MA, Gateway Fiber, an ultra-high-speed fiber internet provider, is introducing a new internet service. The 100% fiber-optic network will deliver faster and more reliable internet compared to traditional cable and telephone-based services. This development signifies Gateway Fiber's dedication to enhancing connectivity in the region. Residents and businesses can expect improved internet speeds and reliability with this new service. Gateway Fiber's investment in fiber infrastructure demonstrates their commitment to bridging the digital divide in Pittsfield.

news.headline: Partnership between HealthRev Partners and Trella Health to enhance home health and hospice agencies with revenue cycle management and market intelligence solutions.
news.summary: HealthRev Partners, a top revenue cycle management partner known for its innovative, technology-focused approach, is embarking on a strategic growth initiative by joining forces with a market intelligence firm. The partnership, announced in October 2024 in Ozark, Missouri and Atlanta, aims to drive financial health by offering complementary solutions. This move is set to enhance their capabilities and expand their reach in the healthcare industry. This collaboration is expected to capitalize on the strengths of both companies to provide clients with a more comprehensive suite of services. The development is key in boosting operational efficiency, fostering growth, and ensuring a competitive edge in the market.

news.headline: Nvidia's latest AI model surpasses GPT-4o in benchmarks, showcasing impressive performance.
Wall Street analysts are bullish on Chipotle (NYSE: CMG) with an average brokerage recommendation of 1.61, based on 31 firms. 21 Strong Buy, 1 Buy.
news.summary: Brokerage firm recommendations play a significant role in influencing stock prices, though their reliability is questionable. Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) currently has an average brokerage recommendation of 1.61, derived from 31 recommendations with 21 Strong Buy and one Buy ratings. Strong Buy and Buy recommendations account for 67.7% and 3.2% respectively. Despite the positive ABR, studies suggest that brokerage recommendations may not reliably guide investors towards stocks with the most price appreciation potential due to the vested interests of these firms. Overall, investors should use these recommendations cautiously when making investment decisions. (words: 1000)

news.headline: Teleperformance sets new carbon emissions targets approved by Science Based Targets initiative to limit global temperature rise to 1.5°C. Paris, New York, Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: Teleperformance (TP), a prominent digital business services company, disclosed its new targets that are in accordance with a stricter framework aimed at restricting the global temperature increase to 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels. This announcement was made on October 17, 2024, in Paris and New York. The targets set by TP suggest a shift towards more ambitious sustainability goals to combat climate change, which reflects a growing trend of companies prioritizing environmental concerns. This move aligns with global efforts to address the pressing issue of climate change and emphasizes the urgency of taking action.

news.headline: Kelso Technologies Inc. reports 2024-Q3 financials, with unaudited statements for three months ending September 30, 2024.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, and Bonham, Texas, on October 17, 2024, Kelso Technologies Inc. (TSX: KLS) announced the publication of its unaudited consolidated interim financial statements and Management Discussion and Analysis for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Evo Security reveals Evo 2.0 for MSPs with enhanced features and leadership, Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on October 17, 2024, Evo Security, a prominent identity and access management (IAM) company catered towards Managed Service Providers (MSPs) and their client base, unveiled significant updates. This announcement included the launch of new products, incorporation of innovative features, introduction of fresh leadership, and the integration of a consolidated identity platform. The company aims to enhance its services by introducing these changes to benefit its clientele.

news.headline: Verdant's HarvestHold Fresh approved for commercial use in California, enhancing produce freshness and sustainability. - in 91 characters
news.summary: Centennial, Colorado - On October 17, 2024, Verdant™ Technologies revealed a groundbreaking post-harvest solution set to revolutionize produce freshness and sustainability in a leading agricultural state. The innovative technology, developed by the trailblazer in agricultural technology and crop protection, aims to enhance the longevity of produce. This advancement is expected to have a significant impact on the agricultural sector, particularly in the state known for its large-scale agricultural production.

news.headline: Hurricane Milton caused $17-28B in insured losses. Total damage likely higher due to uninsured property.
news.summary: CoreLogic, a prominent provider of property information and analytics, revealed their early estimates for the wind and flood losses caused by Hurricane Milton. Their analysis suggests that the total insured losses across residential and commercial properties are likely to fall within the range of $17 billion to $28 billion. It is anticipated that the overall damage, encompassing uninsured property losses as well, will be considerable.

news.headline: Ruoff Mortgage partners with Calque to offer buy-before-you-sell programs, allowing borrowers to access home equity for next purchase in Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Ruhoff Mortgage is offering borrowers the opportunity to utilize the equity in their homes for securing their next home before selling their current one. This initiative allows individuals to access a substantial amount of funds, typically between $100,000 and $500,000, based on the value of their property. This strategy empowers homeowners to make confident and timely decisions when purchasing their next residence.

news.headline: STEP Energy Services Ltd. will announce Q3 2024 results on November 13, host conference call on November 14 at 9am MT. Webcast link: https:/.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, STEP Energy Services Ltd. (TSX: STEP) plans to announce its Q3 2024 results on November 13, 2024, after markets close. The financial statements and Management's Discussion and Analysis will be available on STEP’s website and SEDAR post the press release. A conference call is scheduled for November 14, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. MT. For those interested in listening to the webcast of the call, the link provided should be accessed.

news.headline: EZ-ACCESS sponsors "Make America Healthy Again” round table in Kentucky to address healthcare & accessibility, showing commitment to improving home, work, and play access.
news.summary: In Hopkinsville, Kentucky, a recent Round Table event showcased EZ-ACCESS' dedication to enhancing accessibility in homes, workplaces, and recreational spaces. The sponsorship of the event underscores the company's commitment to improving access for all individuals.

news.headline: Germany's loyalty market has seen 11.7% CAGR during 2019-2023, expected to continue growing at 8%. New programs like PAYBACK Enhancements and Lidl Plus are in focus.
news.summary: A report titled "Germany Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The German loyalty market experienced a 11.7% CAGR from 2019 to 2023. Forecasts suggest that the market will continue expanding, with an expected CAGR of 8 in the upcoming years. This report provides insights on loyalty program trends across various sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics.

news.headline: Abbott Laboratories boasts consistent market-beating returns as the top-returning healthcare stock since 1937, reporting 4.9% growth in Q3.
news.summary: A study by Arizona State University's finance professor, Hendrik Bessembinder, revealed that Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT) ranks 11th in top-returning stock since 1937 and is #1 in the healthcare sector. The key takeaway is Abbott's consistent market-beating returns due to slow, steady growth over the long term. Factors driving its value include company growth, cash flow, dividends, and share repurchases. Abbott's stock also helps reduce portfolio risk with a low beta of 0.7x the S&P 500. In Q3, Abbott reported 4.9% growth despite lower COVID-related sales, with medical devices growing by 11.7% reported and 13.3% organic. This growth signifies Abbott's high-quality stock and value for investors.

news.headline: Hacker who faked SEC Bitcoin ETF approval arrested by FBI. Eric Council Jr. charged with ID theft and fraud.
news.summary: Eric Council Jr. has been accused of plotting to carry out aggravated identity theft and access device fraud, according to legal charges brought against him.

news.headline: Finance website hacked; users urged to wait for fix. Malware spread via Python Package Index, texts, macOS, & emails in 2024.
news.summary: In the year 2024, a significant number of systems were infiltrated by malware distributed through various channels, such as the Python Package Index, text messages, deceitful macOS applications, and automated email threads.

news.headline: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see $20B inflows in 4th day, open dams flood with money since launching in January.
news.summary: Over the past four days, Spot Bitcoin ETFs have seen continuous inflows, leading to a total of more than $20 billion in cumulative flows since their introduction in January.

news.headline: Former FTX engineering director, Nishad Singh, requests reduced sentence for playing 'limited' part in crimes. Pled guilty to fraud, conspiracy charges in Feb. 2023. Next court appearance set for Oct. 30.
news.summary: In February 2023, a former engineering director at FTX admitted guilt to charges of fraud and conspiracy. They are set to appear in court for a sentencing hearing on October 30.

news.headline: Gnosis Pay offers self-custodial crypto debit card, uniting banking with Web3 tech for a new era in payments.
news.summary: A new self-custodial cryptocurrency debit card is emerging as a pioneer of 'banking 3.0,' fusing traditional payment systems with Web3 advancements. This innovation marks a significant leap in the financial sector, offering users the convenience of legacy payment infrastructure alongside the cutting-edge technology of Web3.

news.headline: DevRev upgrades SaaS platform with conversational interface, promises improved enterprise workflow.
news.summary: DevRev, a company based in Palo Alto, California, has unveiled product upgrades aimed at revolutionizing enterprise SaaS with advanced conversational AI capabilities. These enhancements are anticipated to streamline work processes for businesses. Despite the enthusiasm surrounding AI in enterprise settings, companies have encountered barriers such as disjointed systems, AI-human workflow compatibility issues, and data disorganization. The new updates from DevRev are set to tackle these challenges, with a focus on enhancing user experience and efficiency. This development signifies a pivotal moment for the enterprise sector, as organizations seek to leverage AI technologies for improved operations.

news.headline: San Manuel Band of Mission Indians and Yaamava' Resort & Casino win top awards at 2024 Global Gaming Awards - Responsible Business and Property of the Year.
news.summary: A prestigious award was given to the San Manuel Band of Mission Indians and Yaamava' Resort & Casino at San Manuel in Highland, California on October 17, 2024. They were named Responsible Business of the Year and Property of the Year - North America, marking their outstanding achievement in gaming and hospitality. This recognition highlights their commitment to excellence in the industry.

news.headline: Therap Services sponsors 2024 DIR Connect Technology Expo, focusing on IT innovation for public sector.
news.summary: In Torrington, Connecticut, on October 17, 2024, Therap Services, a leading provider of electronic documentation solutions that are compliant with the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA), specializes in serving organizations and agencies within Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS), Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS), and other human services sectors.

news.headline: Skyservice to develop STC for Gogo Galileo HDX on Gulfstream G280, providing operators access to latest technology.
news.summary: A company based in Mississauga, Ontario, known as Skyservice Business Aviation, has disclosed its plan to create a Supplemental Type Certificate (STC) for the installation of Gogo Galileo HDX on Gulfstream G280 planes. This move aims to provide operators with the ability to utilize the newest technology. The announcement was made on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: SGS North America expands food and nutraceutical testing capacity to serve North American markets with new state-of-the-art facilities. (Character count: 118)
news.summary: In Fairfield, New Jersey, on October 17, 2024, SGS North America (SGS) revealed an enhancement in its food safety and quality assurance testing capabilities for the North American food and nutraceutical sectors. The expansion includes relocating to a more spacious, cutting-edge facility, demonstrating the company's commitment to serving the region.

news.headline: DaVita names Jessica Hergenreter as new Chief People Officer to lead People Services team.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Denver, DaVita, a prominent provider of kidney care services, revealed Jessica (Jess) Hergenreter as their newly appointed chief people officer (CPO). Hergenreter will now supervise DaVita's People Services team, spearheading efforts to enhance engagement and morale within the company.

news.headline: Maximus secures spot on $300M IRS consulting services Blanket Purchase Agreement for Non-IT consulting services.
news.summary: Tysons, Virginia - Maximus has secured a position on a Blanket Purchase Agreement with the IRS for Non-IT Consulting Services. This new agreement is significant for Maximus as it opens up opportunities to provide consulting services to the IRS. The agreement allows Maximus to offer a wide range of consulting services to support the IRS in various non-IT projects. This achievement reflects Maximus's expertise and capabilities in providing consulting services, and it is expected to contribute positively to the company's growth and revenue.

news.headline: OPEXUS to host 19th Annual Summit in Washington on Oct 29, coinciding with FOIAXpress' 25th anniversary, expecting 200+ attendees. "Better Together" theme focuses on building trust and accountability in public institutions.
news.summary: An industry leader in government case management software, OPEXUS, has revealed details about its upcoming 19th Annual Summit in Washington, D.C., scheduled for October 29. The summit holds special significance this year as it aligns with the 25th anniversary of the company's flagship product, FOIAXpress, which dominates the federal market and serves over 150 government agencies. The event is expected to host more than 200 government professionals dedicated to fostering trust and ensuring accountability in public institutions. Titled "Better Together," this year's summit aims to emphasize the importance of collaboration and unity for effective governance.

news.headline: Untether AI leading energy-efficient AI acceleration in agriculture, tackling labor shortages, inefficiency. Driving productivity and sustainability.
news.summary: In Toronto, Untether AI®, a prominent company specializing in energy-centric AI acceleration technology, is paving the way for innovation in agriculture. By offering edge-optimized solutions, they are tackling pressing issues such as labor shortages and inefficient resource utilization. Through the implementation of AI in farming practices, Untether AI is revolutionizing the sector by enhancing productivity and sustainability. Their cutting-edge solutions are set to transform agriculture, ensuring a promising future for the industry.

news.headline: Retail sales in September exceed expectations, indicating strong US economy with robust consumer spending.
news.summary: The latest report reveals a notable increase in retail sales for the month of September, pointing towards a strong and steady consumer spending trend. This is crucial as consumer spending plays a significant role in driving economic growth.

news.headline: Global Healthcare Payer Services market valued at $66.3B in 2023, projected to reach $100.8B by 2030, growing at 6.2% CAGR.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on Healthcare Payer Services has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for these services was valued at approximately $66.3 billion in 2023 and is anticipated to increase to around $100.8 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.2% from 2023 to 2030. The report offers a detailed examination of market trends, drivers, and future predictions to assist in making strategic business choices.

news.headline: Alcoa beats Q3 earnings, reports $2.904B sales, 57 cents EPS (exceeding consensus of 28 cents), forecasts 9.8-10M metric tons production in 2024.
news.summary: Alcoa Corporation (AA) exceeded earnings expectations in Q3, with sales totaling $2.904 billion, slightly below the consensus of $2.967 billion. However, their adjusted EPS of 57 cents surpassed the consensus of 28 cents. The company is maintaining its 2024 Alumina segment production forecast at 9.8 to 10 million metric tons and has increased its shipment projection to 12.9 to 13.1 million metric tons.

news.headline: Global micro combined heat and power market to reach $3.24 billion by 2024-2034, featuring top players like Yanmar and Bosch.
news.summary: Dublin - The market for Micro Combined Heat and Power (CHP) is experiencing substantial growth, driven by various factors and market drivers. According to a recent report, the global micro CHP market is estimated to be valued at $3.24 billion in 2024. This growth is expected to continue, with projections indicating an expansion in the coming years. The report offers a detailed analysis of the market, focusing on applications, types, technologies, and regions. With an optimistic outlook, the micro CHP market presents a promising landscape for future developments and investments.

news.headline: Meme coins like TURBO and BRETT outpace Bitcoin gains, ushering in a frothy crypto market with "Uptober" surge.
news.summary: Bitcoin has had a successful week, with its value rising significantly. However, meme cryptocurrencies like TURBO and BRETT are experiencing a surge in value as well, taking advantage of the upward trend known as "Uptober." This increase in popularity is reflected in the rising prices of these coins as they ride the rocket ship to the moon.

news.headline: TrewUp CEO Kyle Barnholt wins GenNext Award from Progressive Grocer for trade spend insights in CPG industry.
news.summary: A company based in Boulder, Colorado called TrewUp, known for offering trade spend insights and optimization solutions to the CPG sector, recently celebrated their CEO and Co-Founder, Kyle Barnholt, being honored as a GenNext Award recipient by Progressive Grocer on October 17, 2024. The award highlights the achievements of emerging leaders in the industry. This recognition showcases TrewUp's commitment to innovation and expertise in the field.

news.headline: MTA predicts debt expenses will impact spending without additional aid from NY officials.

Phase 2 study showcases successful clinical application of antifibrotic therapy for breast cancer, enabling repositioning of new drug candidates. MeCo Diagnostics announces breakthrough on Oct. 17, 2024 in San Diego.
news.summary: A recent study has yielded positive results, prompting several pharmaceutical companies to consider repositioning new antifibrotic drug candidates. news.headline: By 2023, global hyperscale cloud market valued at US$320.59 billion, projected to reach US$1.44 trillion by 2029. Companies switch for efficiency.

The shift towards hyperscale cloud computing by businesses is driven by factors such as enhanced speed, decreased downtime losses, simplified management, and smoother transitions.

news.headline: ERI enhances ITAD services in Indiana with AI, robotics, and battery recycling; operates eight e-waste facilities nationwide.
news.summary: ERI, the top IT and electronics asset disposition (ITAD) provider and cybersecurity-focused hardware destruction company in the US, has expanded its operations to maintain a total of eight cutting-edge e-waste recycling facilities. Among these locations is a state-of-the-art facility in Plainfield, Indiana. This facility is equipped with advanced technologies like AI-driven robotics, hyper-efficient shredding systems, and smart material tracking and reporting capabilities.

news.summary: A new trading option has been introduced by BitMEX, offering DBRUSDT perpetual swaps that permit traders to leverage up to 50 times on the deBridge token. This trading opportunity is now available for live trading.
